case_title: KEITH, ALTHEA CORRAINE VS SHIKAMA, AKIO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KEITH, ALTHEA CORRAINE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIKAMA, AKIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEITH, ALTHEA CORRAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIKAMA, AKIO $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $365.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
